channel.title: Voice-Cloning on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Voice-Cloning on Arrans github.io

item.title: coqui-ai/TTS
item.description: 🐸💬 - a deep learning toolkit for Text-to-Speech, battle-tested in research and production

item.title: DrewThomasson/ebook2audiobook
item.description: Generate audiobooks from e-books, voice cloning & 1158+ languages!

item.title: MbBrainz/ttslab
item.description: TTSLab is THE place to easily test ANY text to text to speech model on your own pc with 0 cost
